100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On July 20, 1926, the American civil aviation industry took a significant step forward with the announcement of a new transcontinental flight route, promising to revolutionize air travel. Meanwhile, unrest continued in Germany as political tensions escalated over reparations and inflation, sparking fears of further instability. In the realm of sports, the British Open concluded with a thrilling finish, highlighting the prowess of golfer Bobby Jones, who continues to captivate the public with his exceptional talent.
